Timeline peek functionality, animations, and item layer management for Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[peek.c](peek.c.md)**: Implements the timeline peek functionality for Pebble firmware, including layout management, animations, and event handling.
- **[peek.h](peek.h.md)**: Header file for managing the TimelinePeek overlay, including initialization, visibility, and event handling.
- **[peek_animations.c](peek_animations.c.md)**: Functions to draw speed lines for compositor foreground, background, and timeline in animations.
- **[peek_animations.h](peek_animations.h.md)**: Functions for drawing speed lines in different contexts for timeline animations.
- **[peek_private.h](peek_private.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing timeline peek popups in the Pebble firmware.
- **[timeline_item_layer.c](timeline_item_layer.c.md)**: Implements functions for managing and rendering timeline item layers, including scrolling and click handling.
- **[timeline_item_layer.h](timeline_item_layer.h.md)**: Defines a mock UI layer for displaying timeline items with initialization, update, and click handling functions.
